tools.name: createSurvey
tools.description: Create a new NPS survey for a client. Sets initial status to DRAFT.

tools.name: sendSurvey
tools.description: Mark an NPS survey as sent and record the send date.

tools.name: listSurveys
tools.description: List NPS surveys with status, client, and date filters.

tools.name: getSurveyResults
tools.description: Get survey details with all responses and NPS summary statistics.

tools.name: analyzeNPS
tools.description: Aggregate NPS scores across clients with trends and insights. Identifies at-risk clients (detractors) and top promoters.

tools.name: submitNPSResponse
tools.description: Record a client NPS response with score and feedback. Automatically categorizes as PROMOTER (9-10), PASSIVE (7-8), or DETRACTOR (0-6).

tools.name: listResponses
tools.description: List NPS responses with category and date filters.

tools.name: createForm
tools.description: Create a configurable form template with sections, fields, and quality rules.

tools.name: listForms
tools.description: List form templates with active status and menu visibility filters.

tools.name: submitForm
tools.description: Submit form data against a template. Validates data against the template configuration.

tools.name: listSubmissions
tools.description: List form submissions with status, date, and assignee filters.

tools.name: reviewSubmission
tools.description: Review and update a form submission status. Supports approval, rejection, and completion workflows.

tools.name: getSubmission
tools.description: Get a single form submission with template metadata and submitted data.
